title: SM Stage Lifecycle — reference stage execution examples
description: Illustrates sequential and parallel stage transitions with grantStageTool tuple binding.

sequential.description: Plan → Build sequential transition. After Plan's Exit, Next returns a sequential NextResult.

parallel.description: Build → [Test, Lint] parallel fan-out with Review join. Q-4: fail-fast on any sibling failure.

failFastOutcome.description: Q-4 resolution: if Test sibling fails, the compound turn aborts immediately.

parallel.joinRunsOnly: when every sibling reaches Exit with verdict ok

smAttach.description: AC-35: on a resumed session, state slots are delivered before attach fires.
